response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, leadership in AI-agent infrastructure, and exposure to MCP and cloud platforms, but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years in production-grade AI systems, vector databases, RAG architectures, or direct enterprise GenAI deployment — key requirements for this staff-level role.
strengths: Proven experience in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Extensive full-stack proficiency with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud tools (AWS CDK)
Demonstrated technical leadership through mentoring, workshops, and open-source contributions
concerns: No clear documentation of 8+ years specifically in production AI systems
Missing explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architectures
Limited evidence of customer-facing technical leadership in enterprise GenAI contexts
